completed_phases: legalize stack_layout liveness out_of_ssa regalloc
invariants:
  - no_target_facing_i1
  - no_phi_nodes
notes:
  - [prealloc] prealloc owns the shared semantic-BIR to prealloc-BIR route before MIR lowering
  - [legalize] bootstrap BIR legalize kept semantic CFG and phi form intact while promoting i1 values plus function signature/storage bookkeeping, memory-address/load-store bookkeeping, and call ABI metadata
  - [stack_layout] stack layout prepared function 'inc_global' with 0 home slot(s) and 0 bytes of frame space

  - [stack_layout] stack layout prepared function 'test_zero_init' with 17 home slot(s) and 56 bytes of frame space
  - [stack_layout] stack layout prepared function 'main' with 0 home slot(s) and 0 bytes of frame space
  - [stack_layout] stack layout now emits provisional stack objects, elides dead and copy-coalesced home slots, and only allocates frame storage for objects that still require dedicated homes
  - [liveness] liveness now computes BIR named-value intervals, exact def/use program points, predecessor-edge phi uses, call points, CFG-aware live-through extension, and loop depth independently of stack-layout object identity
  - [out_of_ssa] out_of_ssa removed phi nodes from live prepared BIR and published authoritative join-transfer plus parallel-copy obligations
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'inc_global' with 2 allocation constraint(s) and 1 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 2 register(s) and 0 stack slot(s)
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'print_' with 16 allocation constraint(s) and 53 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 7 register(s) and 9 stack slot(s)
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'foo' with 192 allocation constraint(s) and 6098 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 50 register(s) and 142 stack slot(s)
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'test_compound_with_relocs' with 9 allocation constraint(s) and 8 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 9 register(s) and 0 stack slot(s)

bir.func @inc_global() -> void {
entry:
  %t0 = bir.load_global i32 @global
  %t1 = bir.add i32 %t0, 1
  bir.store_global @global, i32 %t1
  bir.ret
}

bir.func @print_(ptr %p.name, ptr %p.p, i64 %p.size) -> void {
entry:
  bir.store_local %lv.param.p, ptr %p.p
  bir.store_local %lv.param.size, i64 %p.size
  %t1 = bir.call i32 printf(ptr @.str0, ptr %p.name)
  ; call_arg_source index=0 encoding=computed_address source_value=%t0 source_base=@.str0 source_delta=0
  ; call_arg_source index=1 encoding=computed_address source_value=%p.name source_base=%p.name source_delta=0
  bir.br block_2
block_2:
  %t2 = bir.load_local i64 %lv.param.size
  %t3 = bir.add i64 %t2, -1
  bir.store_local %lv.param.size, i64 %t3
  %t4 = bir.ne i64 %t2, 0
  bir.cond_br i32 %t4, block_3, block_4
block_3:
  %t6 = bir.load_local ptr %lv.param.p
  bir.store_local %lv.param.p, ptr %t7
  %t8 = bir.load_local i8 %t8.addr, addr %t6
  %t9 = bir.zext i8 %t8 to i32
  %t10 = bir.call i32 printf(ptr @.str1, i32 %t9)
  ; call_arg_source index=0 encoding=computed_address source_value=%t5 source_base=@.str1 source_delta=0
  ; call_arg_source index=1 encoding=register source_value_id=13 source_value=%t9
  bir.br block_2
block_4:
  %t12 = bir.call i32 printf(ptr @.str2)
  ; call_arg_source index=0 encoding=computed_address source_value=%t11 source_base=@.str2 source_delta=0
  bir.ret
}

bir.func @test_compound_with_relocs() -> void {
entry:
  bir.store_local %lv.local_wrap.0, ptr 0
  bir.store_local %lv.local_wrap.8, ptr 0
  bir.store_local %lv._clit_.0, ptr 0
  bir.store_local %lv._clit_.0, ptr @inc_global
  %t3.aggregate.copy.0 = bir.load_local ptr %lv._clit_.0
  bir.store_local %lv.local_wrap.0, ptr %t3.aggregate.copy.0
  bir.store_local %lv.local_wrap.8, ptr @inc_global
  %t10 = bir.load_global ptr @global_wrap
  bir.store_local %lv.p, ptr @inc_global
  %t11 = bir.load_local ptr %lv.p
  bir.call void %t11()
  %t15 = bir.load_global ptr @global_wrap, offset 8
  bir.store_local %lv.p, ptr @inc_global
  %t16 = bir.load_local ptr %lv.p
  bir.call void %t16()
  %t20 = bir.load_local ptr %lv.local_wrap.0
  bir.store_local %lv.p, ptr %t20
  %t21 = bir.load_local ptr %lv.p
  bir.call void %t21()
  bir.store_local %lv.p, ptr @inc_global
  %t26 = bir.load_local ptr %lv.p
  bir.call void %t26()
  bir.ret
}

bir.func @test_multi_relocs() -> void {
entry:
  bir.store_local %lv.i, i32 0
  bir.br for.cond.12
for.cond.12:
  %t0 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.i
  %t1 = bir.udiv i64 24, 8
  %t2 = bir.sext i32 %t0 to i64
  %t3 = bir.ult i64 %t2, %t1
  bir.cond_br i32 %t3, block_12, block_13
for.latch.12:
  %t6 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.i
  %t7 = bir.add i32 %t6, 1
  bir.store_local %lv.i, i32 %t7
  bir.br for.cond.12
block_12:
  %t8 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.i
  %t9 = bir.sext i32 %t8 to i64
  %t11.outer0.elt0 = bir.load_global ptr @table
  %t11.outer0.elt1 = bir.load_global ptr @table, offset 8
  %t11.outer0.elt2 = bir.load_global ptr @table, offset 16
  %t11.outer0.sel1 = bir.select eq i64 %t9, 1, ptr %t11.outer0.elt1, %t11.outer0.elt2
  %t11.outer0 = bir.select eq i64 %t9, 0, ptr %t11.outer0.elt0, %t11.outer0.sel1
  bir.call void %t11.outer0()
  bir.br for.latch.12
block_13:
  bir.ret
}

bir.func @test_correct_filling(ptr %p.x) -> void {
entry:
  %t1 = bir.load_local i32 %t1.addr, addr %p.x
  %t2 = bir.ne i32 %t1, 0
  bir.cond_br i32 %t2, logic.skip.6, logic.rhs.5
logic.rhs.5:
  %t10 = bir.load_local i32 %t10.addr, addr %p.x+4
  bir.br logic.rhs.end.7
logic.rhs.end.7:
  bir.br logic.end.8
logic.skip.6:
  bir.br logic.end.8
logic.end.8:

  bir.store_local %lv.d.8, i32 0

  ; call_arg_source index=0 encoding=frame_slot source_value=%lv.b.0 selection=frame_slot_address selection_value=%lv.b.0
